show.title: Domains
show.description: Domains are used to access to the application
show.empty: To access the application it is required to set at least 1 domain
show.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this domain?

dnsHelper.title: DNS Configuration Guide
dnsHelper.description: Follow these steps to configure your DNS records for {host}
dnsHelper.intro: To make your domain accessible, you need to configure your DNS records with your domain provider (e.g., Cloudflare, GoDaddy, NameCheap).
dnsHelper.step1Body: Create an A record that points your domain to the server's IP address:
dnsHelper.step2Lookup: Use a DNS lookup tool to verify your records

form.dialogDescriptionCreate: In this section you can add domains
form.dialogDescriptionEdit: In this section you can edit a domain
form.composeRedeployAlert: Whenever you make changes to domains, remember to redeploy your compose to apply the changes.
form.fetchTooltip: Fetch: Will clone the repository and load the services
form.cacheTooltip: Cache: If you previously deployed this compose, it will read the services from the last deployment/fetch from the repository
form.traefikIpAlertRemoteRich: You need to set an IP address in your <link>Remote Servers -> Server -> Edit Server -> Update IP Address</link> to make your traefik.me domain work.
form.traefikIpAlertWebRich: You need to set an IP address in your <link>Web Server -> Server -> Update Server IP</link> to make your traefik.me domain work.
form.traefikMeInfo: Note: traefik.me is a public HTTP service and does not support SSL/HTTPS. HTTPS and certificate options will not have any effect.
form.internalPathDesc: The path where your application expects to receive requests internally (defaults to "/")
form.stripPathDesc: Remove the external path from the request before forwarding to the application
form.containerPortDesc: The port where your application is running inside the container (e.g., 3000 for Node.js, 80 for Nginx, 8080 for Java)

validation.hostTrim: Domain name cannot have leading or trailing spaces
validation.stripPathRequiresPath: Strip path can only be enabled when a path other than '/' is specified
